import asyncio, os
os.environ['DATABASE_URL'] = 'postgresql://fte_user:fte_password@localhost:5433/fte_db'
os.environ['GEMINI_API_KEY'] = 'AIzaSyBa_SjhzsSwSKC9K7oMgBRbnrX1BetFlCI'

from production.agent.prompts import CUSTOMER_SUCCESS_SYSTEM_PROMPT
from production.agent.formatters import format_for_channel
from production.agent.tools import KnowledgeSearchInput, TicketInput, EscalationInput, ResponseInput, AGENTS_SDK_AVAILABLE
from production.agent.customer_success_agent import run_agent, _get_agent

print\('All agent modules imported OK'\)
print\('Agents SDK available:', AGENTS_SDK_AVAILABLE\)

t = TicketInput\(customer_id='test@test.com', channel='web_form', issue_summary='Test issue'\)
assert t.priority == 'medium'
e = EscalationInput\(reason='pricing_inquiry', urgency='urgent'\)
r = ResponseInput\(channel='email', message='Hello', customer_name='Ali'\)
print\('Pydantic models: OK'\)

async def test\(\):
    email = await format_for_channel\('Test response.', 'email', ticket_id='TKT-001', customer_name='Ali'\)
    assert email.startswith\('Hi Ali,'\)
    assert 'TechCorp Support Team' in email

    wa = await format_for_channel\('Quick answer.', 'whatsapp'\)
    assert 'human' in wa.lower\(\) and len\(wa\) <= 1600

    wf = await format_for_channel\('Web answer.', 'web_form'\)
    assert 'support.techcorp.io' in wf
    print\('Formatters: OK'\)

    agent = _get_agent\(\)
    print\('Agent initialized:', agent.name\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
